title: BrushLogs
description: BrushLogs is a plugin for Minecraft (Paper/Spigot) that logs all actions with blocks and containers in SQLite, allowing you to view the history using a special ‘History Brush’.
body:
![Ka4aiPisyniaka](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/071fc4c545efff539b48517a36dd0e9cfb0bd422_0.webp)  [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-BrushLogger-181717?logo=github)](https://github.com/mark-sus/BrushLogger)

# 🪓 BrushLogs

*A lightweight block and container logging plugin with a custom brush tool to check block history and prevent griefing.*

---
![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LduAqaxj/images/fe31242805246923608dec166198f614311672b9.gif)

## ✨ Features
- 📦 Logs **placed, broken, and exploded blocks**
- 🗄️ Tracks **container interactions** (item insertions and removals)
- 🖌️ Inspect blocks with a **special custom item – the History Brush**
- 🎆 Shows **particle effects** on inspected blocks
- 🎨 Fully customizable messages in `messages.yml` (supports **RGB colors**)
- ♻️ Reload messages without restarting with `/bl reload`

---

## 📝 Commands
| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/bl reload` | Reloads `messages.yml` |
| `/bl maxlog <x>` | _Changes the maximum number of changes displayed in the_ **chat** |

---

## ⚙️ Requirements
- Minecraft **1.20+**
- Works on **Paper / Spigot / Bukkit / Purpur**

---~~~~

> 🪄 *Keep your world safe from griefers with the History Brush!*
